statement.headerDoc:
STEP Q33 — Universal Attractor Framework (partial formalization of
  the Gilbreath-Collatz Structural Isomorphism hypothesis from Paper 120)
  =====================================================================

  Paper 120 Q33 (hypothesis, 2026-04-20):
    "Every iterated integer-valued map with bounded absolute value has
    a finite universal attractor, and folklore-open conjectures like
    Gilbreath's (1958) and Collatz's (1937) are both statements that
    the boundary coordinate is the attractor's anchor."

  This file provides a MINIMAL abstract framework:
    - `applyStep : (List Na

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
